/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/HotelManagement_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/StandardRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/DeluxeRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/SuiteRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/RoomManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Customer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/VIPCustomer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Booking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/BookingException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/BookingManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Date.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Bill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/BillingManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/Validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/FileHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/src/SystemIntegrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/LoginDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/DashboardPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/RoomPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/CustomerPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/BookingPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HotelManagement.dir/ui/StatsPage.cpp.o -o HotelManagement -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
